properties.entry: SELECT user_id FROM users WHERE name = ? AND email = ?
UPDATE users SET email=?, phone=? WHERE user_id=?
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM users WHERE user_id = ? AND name = ? AND email = ?
UPDATE users SET password = ? WHERE user_id = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM users WHERE user_id = ? AND password = ?
INSERT INTO users (user_id, password, email, name, phone) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE email = ? AND user_id != ?
